title: Implement issue 1943 skill-driven AW lane

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement GitHub #1943 and child slices #1944-#1948 in one PR by making AW skill routing primarily main-skill driven.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep the change focused on installed workspace skill bodies, registry routing metadata, payload sync, and activation tests; preserve AW startup, proof, Planning, Memory, setup, and closeout obligations.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact wording, registry scope values, activation hint tuning, and focused test cases that prove reduced overlap.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The lane requires changing CLI command semantics, generated SkillSpec contracts, or broader package architecture beyond skill hierarchy/routing.
canonical_core.next_action: Validate the skill hierarchy changes, update proof evidence, then publish a single PR for #1943-#1948.
proof_expectations: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --changed <changed paths> --task "Implement the open issue lane in one PR. Refer to issuecomment-4860004222 and report under it." --format json
completion_criteria: #1943 has one canonical main AW operating skill, specialized subskills, demoted references, configured-invocation wording, and activation/non-activation proof in one PR.
